channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Communities Adapt Innovative Practices to Survive Climate Change Challenges
item.description: In the latest episode of Eco India, the focus is on communities across India that are grappling with the impacts of climate change and extreme weather events. These communities, often reliant on agric...

item.title: One Nation gains in South Australia could affect federal politics
item.description: The recent electoral success of One Nation in South Australia has raised concerns among Australia's major political parties about its potential impact on federal politics. Former Nationals leader Davi...

item.title: Michigan and Michigan State Advance to Sweet 16 as March Madness Second Round Heats Up
item.description: The 2026 NCAA men’s and women’s basketball tournaments are in full swing, and Saturday’s games narrowed the field toward the Sweet 16. Michigan looked every bit like a championship contender, defeatin...

item.title: South Australian State Election Sparks National Interest as Party Leaders Cast Votes
item.description: The South Australian state election is attracting national attention as Labor Premier Peter Malinauskas aims for a historic victory. Early voting numbers are high, with almost half of eligible voters ...

item.title: US temporarily eases oil sanctions on Iran to release millions of barrels and stabilize supply
item.description: The United States has lifted oil sanctions on Iran temporarily, allowing the sale of millions of barrels of crude oil that have been stranded on tankers due to the ongoing conflict in the region. This...

item.title: US signals potential de-escalation as Iran-Israel conflict intensifies
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced that the United States is considering 'winding down' its military operations against Iran, even as Iran and Israel continued exchanging intense attacks. Trump, spea...

item.title: Nigerian intern doctors lament repeated salary delays and lack of response from health authorities
item.description: House officers across Nigeria, wey dem dey call intern doctors, don raise alarm again say their salaries no dey come on time. Dis wahala no be today matter — e don dey happen since 2021, when some hos...

item.title: Marc Kennedy hosts 8th annual youth curling bonspiel to close the season
item.description: Canadian curler Marc Kennedy marked the end of the curling season by hosting his 8th annual bonspiel for youth athletes in Edmonton. The event brought together dozens of young players from across Albe...

item.title: Balancing Faith and Modern Life: How Today’s World Shapes Religious Festivals
item.description: The article by Mwita Chacha reflects on how modern lifestyles have influenced the meaning and observance of major religious festivals like Idd ul-Fitr, Easter, Diwali, and Christmas. Traditionally, su...

item.title: African Airlines Face Rising Fuel Costs Due to Supply Disruptions
item.description: Mambo ni yanaendelea kuwa magumu kwa mashirika ya ndege barani Afrika, because the price of jet fuel imeongezeka sana. The problem is, the supply imepungua, because of the conflict involving the Unite...

item.title: Iranians Celebrate Eid Amid Reports of Nuclear Plant Strike in Tehran
item.description: Iranians observed Eid celebrations on March 21, 2026, even as Tehran reported an alleged strike on one of its nuclear facilities. Authorities have confirmed that a security incident occurred, though d...

item.title: Malema strikes conciliatory tone towards Zuma amid EFF rally
item.description: At an Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) voter registration launch in Polokwane on Saturday, party leader Julius Malema spoke warmly of former president Jacob Zuma, calling him a 'kind old man'. Zuma had...

item.title: Tributes pour in for Dame Jenni Murray, veteran broadcaster and former Woman’s Hour host
item.description: Dame Jenni Murray, the celebrated journalist and broadcaster best known for hosting BBC Radio 4’s Woman’s Hour for over three decades, has died aged 75. Her family confirmed that she passed away on 12...

item.title: Danny Welbeck’s brace lifts Brighton past struggling Liverpool at the Amex
item.description: Danny Welbeck was the star of the show as Brighton & Hove Albion edged Liverpool 2-1 at the Amex Stadium on Saturday, in a Premier League match that had big implications for both teams. The game was d...

item.title: Kent sees rise in meningitis cases as vaccination effort expands
item.description: The number of confirmed or suspected meningitis cases in Kent has risen from 29 to 34, according to the UK Health Security Agency, with 23 laboratory-confirmed cases and 11 under investigation. Follow...

item.title: Trump Criticizes NATO for Lack of Support as US Deploys More Marines to Middle East
item.description: President Donald Trump has sharply criticized NATO allies for not sending enough support to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway that handles a significant portion of the world's oil and...

item.title: Supreme Court petition challenges legality of BARMM’s 2026 budget
item.description: A petition has been filed before the Supreme Court questioning the constitutionality of the 2026 budget of the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM). Petitioners Abdulsukor Mustapah ...

item.title: Minister Absent from Key Discussion on Transgender Rights Bill with NCTP Members
item.description: The Union Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment convened a meeting on Saturday with members of the National Council of Transgender Persons (NCTP) following widespread criticism of the recently pr...

item.title: Robert Mueller, Former FBI Director Who Led Trump-Russia Inquiry, Passes Away
item.description: Robert Mueller, the former FBI director who led the investigation into alleged ties between Donald Trump's campaign and Russia, has passed away at the age of 81. His family confirmed the news on March...

item.title: Police probe alleged dumping of bodies at Kericho public cemetery
item.description: Police in Kericho County have launched an investigation after a shocking report of a suspected mass grave at the Makaburini public cemetery. The discovery was made after two street boys, aged 23 and 2...
